question: 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' aur 'Assam' states ke liye har state name aur unke total sub-district names ka count dikhao, state name se group karke aur sub-districts ke count ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karke.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME IN ('Andaman And Nicobar Islands', 'Assam') GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.state_name, 
    COUNT(dsd.sub_district_name) AS total_sub_districts
FROM 
    dim_state ds
JOIN 
    dim_district dd ON ds.state_id = dd.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district dsd ON dd.district_id = dsd.district_id
WHERE 
    ds.state_name ILIKE 'andaman and nicobar islands' OR ds.state_name ILIKE 'assam'
GROUP BY 
    ds.state_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sub_districts DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    ds.state_name, 
    COUNT(dsd.sub_district_name) AS total_sub_districts
FROM 
    dim_state ds
JOIN 
    dim_district dd ON ds.state_id = dd.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district dsd ON dd.district_id = dsd.district_id
WHERE 
    ds.state_name ILIKE 'andaman and nicobar islands' OR ds.state_name ILIKE 'assam'
GROUP BY 
    ds.state_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sub_districts DESC;
